name: presence-system
description: Realtime online/offline status, last_seen, and customizable statuses (online/away/dnd) via Socket.IO

requiresContract.description: Project must export getDb() — same as the auth module requires
requiresContract.sharedState: Needs an `onlineUsers` Map<userId, socketId> shared across all socket modules

postInstall: 1. Run DB migration (ignore 'duplicate column' errors): sqlite3 data/app.db < db/migrations/002_presence.sql
2. In server.js — call attachPresence(io, db, socket, onlineUsers) inside io.on('connection')
3. Client — use usePresence(socket) in your chat component
